Name: WEAPON_STAMINA_COST_PARAM
Description: Defines stamina consumption multipliers for weapon attacks performed in different stances and attack categories.

Fields.Name: 1H Light Attack 1 Stamina %
Fields.Description: Multiplier applied to stamina consumption for the first 1H light attack.

Fields.Name: 1H Light Attack 2 Stamina %
Fields.Description: Multiplier applied to stamina consumption for the second 1H light attack.

Fields.Name: 1H Heavy Attack 1 Stamina %
Fields.Description: Multiplier applied to stamina consumption for the first 1H heavy attack.

Fields.Description: Multiplier applied to stamina consumption for 1H step attacks.

Fields.Description: Multiplier applied to stamina consumption for 1H attacks performed while downed.

Fields.Description: Multiplier applied to stamina consumption for 1H falling attacks.

Fields.Description: Multiplier applied to stamina consumption for 1H jumping attacks.
